creator: grahamperrin@freebsd.org
text:
Thanks. 

<https://gitlab.gnome.org/GNOME/gimp/-/issues/8576#note_1562130> (2022-09-27): 

> Make that 2.74.1: this is exactly the sort of regression that 
> stable-branch point releases are for.

Via <https://www.freshports.org/devel/glib20/#history>: 

<https://github.com/freebsd/freebsd-ports/commit/4c90553fa54204d5dd5bd2d6b5064f73f2e29e9a> (main, 2022-10-26)

> devel/glib20: update to 2.74.1

jbeich@ please, should we have a merge of 4c90553fa54204d5dd5bd2d6b5064f73f2e29e9a to quarterly?

(I'm glancing, not in detail, at some of the other reports for graphics/gimp-app with keyword crash.)
